items.description: Staff engineer specializing in distributed systems, developer tooling, and frontend architecture with 8+ years of experience building products at scale.

items.summary: Staff Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience architecting and delivering high-impact products across the full stack. Led cross-functional teams of up to 12 engineers, shipping systems that serve 50M+ monthly active users. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems. Passionate about developer experience, performance optimization, and building inclusive engineering cultures. Speaker at ReactConf and GraphQL Summit.

items.description:
• Architected and led the migration of the merchant dashboard from a monolithic Rails app to a micro-frontend architecture using React and TypeScript, reducing page load times by 45% and improving developer velocity by 3x
  • Designed and implemented a real-time fraud detection pipeline processing 10M+ transactions daily using Apache Kafka, Flink, and custom ML models, reducing false positives by 32%
  • Mentored 8 engineers across 3 teams, establishing code review standards and technical design doc processes adopted org-wide
  • Led the design system initiative, creating 60+ reusable components used across 15 product teams, reducing UI inconsistencies by 70%

• Built the next-generation search experience using React Server Components and Edge Functions, improving Time-to-Interactive by 60% across mobile devices
  • Developed a GraphQL federation gateway that unified 12 microservices, reducing API response times by 40% and eliminating 200+ redundant endpoints
  • Implemented A/B testing infrastructure supporting 500+ concurrent experiments, enabling data-driven product decisions across the platform
  • Contributed to open-source projects including Apollo GraphQL and Next.js, with 3 merged PRs improving server-side rendering performance

• Developed the storefront rendering engine powering 2M+ online stores, optimizing Largest Contentful Paint scores by 35% through image lazy-loading and critical CSS extraction
  • Built a plugin architecture for the checkout flow, enabling merchants to add custom payment methods and shipping integrations without modifying core code
  • Reduced CI/CD pipeline execution time from 45 minutes to 12 minutes by parallelizing test suites and implementing intelligent test selection based on code changes

items.title: DevFlow — Developer Productivity Platform
items.description:
• Built an open-source developer productivity platform that unifies code review, CI/CD monitoring, and incident management into a single dashboard
  • Achieved 4,200+ GitHub stars and 180+ contributors within 6 months of launch
  • Implemented real-time collaboration using CRDTs and WebSocket connections, supporting 500+ concurrent users

items.title: LightQuery — Lightweight GraphQL Client
items.description:
• Created a zero-dependency GraphQL client for React that is 8x smaller than Apollo Client while supporting 90% of common use cases
  • Featured in JavaScript Weekly and adopted by 300+ production applications
  • Implemented automatic persisted queries and intelligent request batching, reducing network overhead by 55%

items.title: SnapDeploy — One-Click Deployment CLI
items.description:
• Developed a CLI tool that automates infrastructure provisioning, Docker containerization, and deployment to AWS/GCP with a single command
  • Reduced average deployment time from 25 minutes to under 3 minutes for small-to-medium projects
  • Supports automatic SSL provisioning, environment variable management, and rollback capabilities

items: Speaker at ReactConf 2024 — 'Scaling Micro-Frontends at Stripe'
Winner, Stripe Internal Hackathon 2023 — Built AI-powered code review assistant
Published 'Practical Guide to GraphQL Federation' — 15K+ reads on engineering blog
Open Source Contributor — 50+ merged PRs across React, Next.js, and Apollo projects
Keynote at GraphQL Summit 2023 — 'Zero-Downtime Schema Evolution at Scale'
Recipient of Airbnb Engineering Excellence Award (2021)
